message:
fix(core): fix 3 bugs found in TuningConfig fresh-eyes review

1. IpcTuning: add DEFAULT_ACCEPT_POLL_INTERVAL_MS const (was raw literal
   100), redirect ipc.rs IPC_ACCEPT_POLL_INTERVAL to use it

2. WorkflowsTuning: add missing on_error_cooldown_ms,
   swarm_learning_index_cooldown_ms, and auth_cooldown_ms fields so
   operators can override them via ft.toml (previously the DEFAULT_
   consts existed but had no corresponding struct fields)

3. handlers.rs: redirect AUTH_COOLDOWN_MS to WorkflowsTuning default
   (was still a raw literal 5 * 60 * 1000)

Also adds test assertions for the 3 new WorkflowsTuning fields.

Validation: rch cargo check -p frankenterm-core --no-default-features => exit 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
